extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: all “By Company,” “By Directors,” “By Promoter,” and “By Subsidiaries” rows are excluded; the “Against” rows counted are criminal: Nil across company, directors, promoter and subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory actions: 2 against the Company, 1 against Directors, 1 against the Promoter and 1 against Subsidiaries; and tax proceedings: Nil against the Company and Subsidiaries. The quantified litigation amount against the Company is ₹71.93 million, while the amount against Subsidiaries is not quantifiable; therefore the aggregate quantified amount against the consolidated group is ₹71.93 million, or ₹7.193 crore, excluding promoter/director matters and all “By” matters. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated Total of ₹71.88 million as at March 31, 2023, converted to ₹7.188 crore rather than re-summing the line items. The company-wide top-10 customer concentration is 31.92% of revenue from operations for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2023; no company-wide top-5 percentage is disclosed. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
